iti58:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti58:1.3: "There are these three cravings. Which three? Craving for sensuality, craving for becoming, craving for non-becoming. These are the three cravings."
iti58:1.4: Bound with the bondage of craving, their minds smitten with becoming and non-, they are bound with the bondage of Māra — people with no safety from bondage, beings going through the wandering-on, headed for birth and death.
iti58:1.5: While those who've abandoned craving, free from the craving for becoming and non-, reaching the ending of fermentations, though in the world, have gone beyond.
iti58:1.6: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
